The Brutalist

dir. Brady Corbet movie 2024
Planned
Added  Mar 01, 2025

3.5 hour epic. Making time for this one.

NOW SHOWING — 3 titles

Oppenheimer

dir. Christopher Nolan movie 2023
Completed
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Added  Jul 20, 2023 Done  Jul 22, 2023
A stunning achievement. The IMAX sequences are genuinely jaw-dropping and Cillian Murphy is extraordinary. The non-linear structure keeps the tension unbearable throughout.

Severance

tv 2022
Completed
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Added  Mar 01, 2022 Done  Apr 15, 2022
One of the most original shows in years. The premise is brilliant and the execution is flawless. Season 1 ended on a cliffhanger that haunted me for months.

Blade Runner 2049

dir. Denis Villeneuve movie 2017
Completed
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Added  Aug 01, 2024 Done  Sep 05, 2024
Patient, gorgeous, and profound. Roger Deakins' cinematography is the best I've ever seen. A rare sequel that expands on the original's ideas.
